title: ModelEngine-Group/nexent
description: Nexent is a zero-code platform for auto-generating production-grade AI agents using Harness Engineering principles — unified tools, skills, memory, and orchestration with built-in constraints, feedback loops, and control planes.

title: AltimateAI/altimate-code
description: Open-source agentic data engineering harness for dbt, SQL, and cloud warehouses. 100+ tools, 10 warehouses, AI-powered.

title: affaan-m/everything-claude-code
description: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.

title: bytedance/deer-flow
description: An open-source long-horizon SuperAgent harness that researches, codes, and creates. With the help of sandboxes, memories, tools, skill, subagents and message gateway, it handles different levels of tasks that could take minutes to hours.

title: shareAI-lab/learn-claude-code
description: Bash is all you need -  A nano claude code–like 「agent harness」, built from 0 to 1

title: can1357/oh-my-pi
description: ⌥  AI Coding agent for the terminal — hash-anchored edits, optimized tool harness, LSP, Python, browser, subagents, and more

title: langchain-ai/langchain - langchain-ollama==1.1.0
description:
Changes since langchain-ollama==1.0.1

release(ollama): 1.1.0 (#36574)
feat(ollama): support `response_format` (#34612)
fix(ollama): serialize `reasoning_content` back to ollama `thinking` (#36573)
fix(ollama): prevent `_convert_messages_to_ollama_messages` from mutating caller list (#36567)
feat(ollama): add `dimensions` to `OllamaEmbeddings` (#36543)
fix(ollama): respect scheme-less `base_url` (#34042)
feat(ollama): logprobs support in Ollama (#34218)
chore(ollama): switch to `ty` (#36571)
cho

title: langchain-ai/langchain - langchain-core==1.2.27
description:
Changes since langchain-core==1.2.26

release(core): 1.2.27 (#36586)
fix(core): handle symlinks in deprecated prompt save path (#36585)
chore: add comment explaining `pygments>=2.20.0` (#36570)

Credit to Jeff Ponte (@JDP-Security) for reporting the symlink resolution issue in #36585.

title: 今日のClaude Code v2.1.94 リリース｜毎日Changelog解説
MCPサーバー入門 — Claude Codeで始める「手を動かせるAI」の作り方
MCP（Model Context Protocol）入門 — AIエージェントと外部ツールをつなぐ標準規格
IBM BobにMCPサーバーを設定する: Xcode 26.3 MCP接続方法
Claude Codeで「1プロンプトサイト複製」が話題だけど、本当にヤバいのは“UI実装の重心”がズレ始めたこと
